title: Rome 11:00
writer: Cesare Zavattini, Basilio Franchina, Giuseppe De Santis
actors: Lucia Bosè, Carla Del Poggio, Maria Grazia Francia
plot: Five women interviewed for a job in 1951 Rome. A staircase collapsed during chaos, injuring many. The film follows how this incident impacted their different lives, some finding change, others disappointment.
